goldskulltulas.description: In the room where you obtain the slingshot. Press the yellow switch to raise the platform and jump to the alcove on the left, avoiding the regular skulltula in your way
After jumping down through the large web in the main room, use your slingshot to kill the skulltula then climb the web to collect the token
In the same room as token #2, lurking over the water. Use your slingshot again to kill it then take a running leap towards the token
After burning the spider web blocking the door in the basement, look on the wall near the water to find the skulltula.
Near the entrance to Kakariko Village, look for a tree in the fenced-in area. Roll into it and a skulltula will fall out.
At night, near the entrance to the Lon Lon Ranch, a skulltula will appear on one of the walls surrounding the ranch.
In the tree at the entrance of Hyrule Castle. Roll into the tree to make the skulltula fall.
In the area where Talon is sleeping. Look up at the brick wall near the guard shack at night.
On the side of the House of Skulltula, near the construction site. It only appears at night.
Climb up the ladder to the watchtower near the windmill at night. You'll find a skulltula on the side of the tower.
In a pile of soft soil at the base of the tree near the graveyard entrance. Use a bottle of bugs to lure the skulltula out.
At the rear of the graveyard. Roll into the tree to make the skulltula fall from its branches.
On the wall near the back of the graveyard. It only appears at night, and you'll need to use your boomerang to grab the token.
Look for a skulltula on the wall near the entrance to Goron City. It only appears at night.
Near the entrance to Dodongo's Cavern, there is a patch of soft soil. Use a bottle of bugs to summon the skulltula.
Inside the crater, near the entrance, there is a climbable wall with a skulltula on it.
On the ladder that leads up to the waterfall near the entrance to Zora's Domain. The skulltula appears at night.
Near the bridge in Zora's River, roll into the nearby tree to make a skulltula fall.
At the entrance to Zora's Fountain, climb the wall near the waterfall to find a skulltula at night.
On the back wall near Jabu-Jabu, you will find a skulltula at night. Use your slingshot to kill it and grab the token.
On the back wall of the Lakeside Laboratory, there is a skulltula that appears at night. Use your boomerang to retrieve the token.
In a patch of soft soil near the Lakeside Laboratory, use a bottle of bugs to reveal a skulltula.
On one of the small islands near the Fishing Pond, look for a skulltula on the back of the tree at night.
At night, look on the wall near the waterfall to find a skulltula. You will need the boomerang to retrieve the token.
In a crate near the entrance to the valley, roll into the crate to break it and reveal a skulltula.
On the far side of the valley, near the broken bridge, a skulltula appears on the wall at night.
At night, look on the wall of the fortress near the horse pen to find a skulltula.
Behind the fortress, look on the wooden structure near the archery range to find a skulltula at night.
In the Haunted Wasteland, look for a skulltula on one of the stone structures near the flags at night.
On the outer wall of the Spirit Temple, there is a skulltula that appears at night.
Near the temple entrance, use a bottle of bugs on the soft soil to reveal a skulltula.
In the first area of the Lost Woods, roll into the tree on the right to make a skulltula fall.
In the area near the bridge to the Sacred Forest Meadow, a skulltula appears on the wall at night.
In the area where you play the memory game with the Skull Kid, there is a soft soil patch. Use bugs to reveal a skulltula.
Look for a skulltula on the wall near the entrance to the Forest Temple at night.
In the main courtyard with the well, climb the vines to find a skulltula hidden among the leaves.
In the twisted corridor, there is a skulltula on the ceiling. Use your hookshot to grab the token.
In one of the rooms with the rotating walls, look on the ceiling for a skulltula.
In the room with the four Poe Sisters, a skulltula can be found on the wall near the entrance.
Inside the crater, near the Fire Temple entrance, look for a skulltula on the climbable wall.
In the first large room of the temple, look on the wall to the left to find a skulltula.
In the maze room with the rolling boulders, look for a skulltula on the wall.
In the room with the pillar of fire, look behind one of the pillars to find a skulltula.
In the room with the large bridge, a skulltula is hiding on one of the walls. Use the hookshot to reach it.
In the room with the spinning blade, look behind the ice blocks to find a skulltula.
In the room with the red ice, use blue fire to melt the ice and reveal a skulltula.
In the central tower, raise the water level and then swim to find a skulltula on the wall.
In the room with the rolling boulders, there is a skulltula hidden behind one of the boulders.
In the waterfall room, look behind the waterfall to find a skulltula.
In the room where you fight Dark Link, look on the walls to find a skulltula.
In one of the large rooms near the entrance, a skulltula can be found on the ceiling.
In the room with the invisible floor, look on the walls to find a skulltula.
In the coffin room, a skulltula is hiding behind one of the coffins.
In the first room with the spinning blade, look behind one of the walls to find a skulltula.
In the room with the invisible platforms, look on the walls to find a skulltula.
In the boat room, there is a skulltula on the wall near the dock.
In the room with the giant fans, look behind the fans to find a skulltula.
In the room with the giant statue, look on the statue's hands to find a skulltula.
In the room with the rotating mirror, a skulltula is hidden behind one of the mirrors.
In the room with the silver rupees, look on the walls to find a skulltula.
In the room with the boulders, look behind one of the boulders to find a skulltula.
In a tree near the entrance to Lake Hylia, roll into the tree to make a skulltula fall.
On the wall of the House of Skulltula, a skulltula appears at night.
On the side of Impa's house, a skulltula appears at night.
Behind the gravestones, a skulltula can be found at night.
On the wall near the entrance to Goron City, a skulltula appears at night.
In the room with the rolling Goron, a skulltula can be found on the wall.
Near the waterfall leading to Zora's Domain, a skulltula can be found at night.
On the wall near the entrance to Zora's Fountain, a skulltula can be found at night.
On the wall near Jabu-Jabu, a skulltula can be found at night.
On the wall of the horse pen, a skulltula appears at night.
Inside the silo, a skulltula can be found on the wall.
In the back area of the ranch, look on the walls to find a skulltula at night.
On the wall near the entrance to the Forest Temple, a skulltula appears at night.
On the wall of the Lakeside Laboratory, a skulltula appears at night.
On the wall near the waterfall, a skulltula can be found at night.
On the wall of the fortress near the horse pen, a skulltula appears at night.
On the outer wall of the Spirit Temple, a skulltula appears at night.
On the wall near the flags, a skulltula can be found at night.
On the wall near Jabu-Jabu, a skulltula can be found at night.
In the room with the giant statue, a skulltula can be found on the statue's hands.
In the room with the invisible platforms, a skulltula can be found on the walls.
In the room where you fight Dark Link, a skulltula can be found on the walls.
In the room with the red ice, a skulltula can be found after melting the ice.
In the room with the large bridge, a skulltula can be found on the walls.
In the room with the four Poe Sisters, a skulltula can be found on the walls.
On the wall near the archery range, a skulltula can be found at night.
On the wall near the broken bridge, a skulltula can be found at night.
On the wall near the waterfall, a skulltula can be found at night.
In the back area of the ranch, a skulltula can be found on the walls at night.
On the wall near the Fishing Pond, a skulltula can be found at night.
On the wall near the castle moat, a skulltula can be found at night.
On the wall near the construction site, a skulltula can be found at night.
On the wall near the entrance to the graveyard, a skulltula can be found at night.
On the wall near the entrance to Zora's Domain, a skulltula can be found at night.
On the wall near the entrance to the Sacred Forest Meadow, a skulltula can be found at night.
On the wall near the waterfall, a skulltula can be found at night.
On the wall near the archery range, a skulltula can be found at night.
In the room with the giant statue, a skulltula can be found on the statue's hands.
In the room with the invisible platforms, a skulltula can be found on the walls.
